messages.content: Based on what you know about me today and yesterday, create knowledge-context-intention based protocols regarding my personal and worklife

### Big Work To Do 🔨
*   Person leave manager job. Dug think you find new person. 🗿
*   Make paper for sick people. Explain how Teams app work. You say you write it: "אני יכול לכתוב מין תוכן כזה".
*   Write words for sick people far away. For Maccabi, say no service. 🗿
*   Think hard if want to help sick people far away. You say: "אני רוצה לעשות קצת סקירה בנושא".
*   Send work paper (contract) to person who leave. You say: "خليني اكتب عندي بس انه ابعث لك سكان".

### Talks and Checks 🗣️
*   Wait for mail from person who leave. She tell you what work is open.
*   Plan talk with doctors (Atef and Ahmed). Teach on-call plan.
*   Plan talk with Reut and Tal. Test on-call plan. 🗿
*   Talk with Shachar and Roy. Check on-call plan is good.
*   Use WhatsApp group to find time for doctor meeting. 🗿
